author: y4rr
content: [result] Removed all 6 allow(dead_code) suppressions and wired every function properly: (1) unwrap_buffer_f64_mut — 2 callers now use it instead of inlining downcast, (2) is_f64 in grad_fns/linalg.rs — mm_backward_gpu, MmBtBackward, LinearFusedBackward all dispatch matmul_f64/transpose_2d_f64/sum_axis_f64 for f64 tensors, (3) is_f64 in grad_fns/shape.rs — CatBackward, SplitBackward, cat forward all dispatch strided_split_f64/strided_cat_f64, (4) is_f64 in linalg.rs — all 8 decomposition functions use explicit is_f64 guard with unsupported type error, (5) is_f64 in norm.rs — LayerNormBackward and RMSNormBackward dispatch _f64 variants, (6) is_f64 in embedding.rs — EmbeddingBackward scatter_add_rows_f64 and Embedding forward embed_lookup_batch_f64. 0 warnings, 3445 tests pass.
